agent.default_greeting: Hello, thank you for calling. How can I help you today?
agent.recording_disclosure: This call may be recorded for quality purposes.
agent.language_clarification: Would you prefer English or Spanish?
agent.unsupported_language_apology: I'm sorry, I am still learning {language}. Let me get someone to help you.
agent.call_wrap_up: I want to make sure I've captured everything you need. Let me summarize before we finish.
agent.transfer_attempt: Let me transfer you to the team now.
agent.capture_name: May I have your name, please?
agent.capture_job_type: Could you describe the issue you're experiencing?
agent.fallback_no_booking: I've noted your information and someone from our team will follow up with you shortly.
agent.language_barrier_escalation: I'm going to make sure someone who speaks {language} gets back to you right away.

notifications.language_barrier_alert: LANGUAGE BARRIER: Caller spoke {language}. Needs follow-up.

auth.signup_link: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.signin_link: Already have an account? Sign in

onboarding.step1_subtext: Start with your business name and how you'd like your AI to sound.
onboarding.step2_subtext: Pick your trade to get a starter service list. You can edit it anytime.
onboarding.step3_subtext: Verify your mobile number and we'll assign your AI phone number.
onboarding.activation_heading: Your AI is ready to answer calls
onboarding.activation_subtext: Call {number} to test it, or hit the button below and we'll call you.
onboarding.tone_professional_desc: Measured and formal. Builds trust with first-time callers.
onboarding.tone_friendly_desc: Upbeat and warm. Feels approachable for residential customers.
onboarding.tone_local_expert_desc: Relaxed and neighborly. Works well for established local businesses.
onboarding.services_section_helper: These are pre-tagged based on your trade. You can add or remove services now, or edit tags anytime after setup.
onboarding.phone_helper: We'll text you a verification code and use this for owner alerts.
onboarding.error_business_name_empty: Enter your business name to continue.
onboarding.error_no_trade: Select a trade to get your starter service list.
onboarding.error_phone_invalid: Enter a valid mobile number, including the country code.
onboarding.error_otp_incorrect: That code doesn't match. Check your SMS and try again.
onboarding.error_otp_expired: The code has expired. Tap 'Resend code' to get a new one.
onboarding.error_provisioning_failed: We couldn't assign a phone number right now. Refresh and try again, or contact support.
onboarding.error_test_call_failed: We couldn't place the test call. Dial {number} directly to test your AI.
onboarding.error_save_failed: Changes couldn't be saved. Check your connection and try again.

services.empty_body: Add your first service so your AI knows what jobs to expect.
services.working_hours_coming_soon: Working hours configuration is coming soon.
services.checklist_subtext: Your AI is live. These optional steps make it even better.

escalation.section_description: When an emergency call comes in and no one answers, your AI tries each contact in order before offering a booking slot or callback.
escalation.emergency_desc: Tries full chain. Offers next slot if no answer.
escalation.high_ticket_desc: Sends SMS and email to owner immediately.
escalation.routine_desc: Saved as a lead. No escalation.
escalation.empty_body: Add contacts in order of priority. When no one answers an emergency call, your AI works through this list before offering a slot or callback.
escalation.save_error: Couldn't save your chain. Check your connection and try again.
escalation.remove_description: They won't be notified on future emergency calls.
escalation.contact_timeout_help: How long before trying the next contact
escalation.phone_required: Phone is required for SMS notifications.
escalation.email_required: Email is required for email notifications.
